documentation.description:
Wind estimate from vehicle. Note that despite the name, this message does
not actually contain any covariances but instead variability and accuracy
fields in terms of standard deviation (1-STD).

record_types.name: Wind_Cov

fields.name: Time_Usec
fields.description:
Units: [us]
Timestamp (UNIX Epoch time or time since system boot). The receiving
end can infer timestamp format (since 1.1.1970 or since system boot)
by checking for the magnitude of the number.

fields.name: Wind_X
fields.description:
Units: [m/s]
Wind in North (NED) direction (NAN if unknown)

fields.name: Wind_Y
fields.description:
Units: [m/s]
Wind in East (NED) direction (NAN if unknown)

fields.name: Wind_Z
fields.description:
Units: [m/s]
Wind in down (NED) direction (NAN if unknown)

fields.name: Var_Horiz
fields.description:
Units: [m/s]
Variability of wind in XY, 1-STD estimated from a 1 Hz lowpassed
wind estimate (NAN if unknown)

fields.name: Var_Vert
fields.description:
Units: [m/s]
Variability of wind in Z, 1-STD estimated from a 1 Hz lowpassed wind
estimate (NAN if unknown)

fields.name: Wind_Alt
fields.description:
Units: [m]
Altitude (MSL) that this measurement was taken at (NAN if unknown)

fields.name: Horiz_Accuracy
fields.description:
Units: [m/s]
Horizontal speed 1-STD accuracy (0 if unknown)

fields.name: Vert_Accuracy
fields.description:
Units: [m/s]
Vertical speed 1-STD accuracy (0 if unknown)

subprograms.name: Check_CRC
subprograms.code:
function Check_CRC
  (Connect : in out MAVLink.V1.Connection)
   return Boolean

documentation.description: Returns True if CRC is valid

subprograms.name: Check_CRC

subprograms.name: Decode

documentation.description:
Get the message from the Connect and delete it
from the Connect's buffer. CRC_Valid is set to
True if x25crc is valid for the message.

subprograms.name: Decode

documentation.description: Same as Above but does not check CRC

subprograms.name: Decode

documentation.description:
Get the message from the Connect and delete it
from the Connect's buffer. CRC_Valid is set to
True if x25crc is valid for the message.

documentation.description: Put the message in the buffer ready for send
